text.message: You can do something really funny oJ
Would you trade me wood on 1st turn? I can trade u ore?
Sorry, its my only chance at the game
U are too strong here blue

Yeah but they are no good
we will determine if they aren't good
Y’all are this scared of me
i'll take it as  a compliment

All 3 of us going for army, one road guy
Extend black unless u have the win
